description: CompositionPolo neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with dark blue collar, buttoned placket, bold black, white and grey stripes, vented hem with slightly longer back panel and with embroidered logo on the left chestFittingRegularWash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry normal or line dry Warm iron Look simple and sophisticated with this bold striped tee from locomotive. The embroidered lettering on the left chest adds an element of interest to the tee. Team this withchinos and leather slip-ons for a cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
